title.rendered: Can a Flat Roof Get Pitched?

content.rendered:
Are you considering changing the pitch of your flat roof? It’s a common question for homeowners with flat roofing in Calgary, where heavy snowfall is common. While it may seem impossible to change the pitch of a flat roof, the answer is yes, it can be done. Learn what pitching a flat roof entails from a trusted Calgary roofing company and the benefits it can provide for your home.

 

Pitching Flat Roofing in Calgary: Is It Possible?

The short answer is yes, a flat roof can be pitched. However, the process can be complex and requires the expertise of a professional roofing contractor. Pitching a flat roof involves adding a slight slope to the roof to encourage water runoff. A Calgary roofing company will need to modify the existing roof structure, which can include significant alterations to the underlying support beams and adding a new layer of roofing materials.

Benefits of Pitching a Flat Roofing in Calgary

There are several benefits to pitching a flat roof. The primary benefit is improved drainage. With a pitched roof, rainwater and snowmelt can easily drain off the roof, preventing pooling and water damage. Additionally, a pitched roof can improve the overall structural integrity of the roof, as the slope provides additional support against the weight of heavy snow and ice. Another benefit of a pitched roof is improved energy efficiency. With a sloped roof, there is more room for insulation, which can help to keep your home warmer in the winter and cooler in the summer. It can lead to significant energy savings over time, making it a wise investment for homeowners in Calgary.

 

What to Consider Before Pitching

While pitching a flat roof is possible, it’s important to note that not all flat roofs can be pitched. The process requires a thorough assessment of the existing roof structure and may only be suitable for some homes. Additionally, working with a professional roofing contractor with experience in flat roofing in Calgary is essential. A professional contractor can assess the condition of your existing roof, determine whether it can be pitched, and provide recommendations on the best course of action for your home.

 

In conclusion, while pitching a flat roof can be complex, it is possible and can provide significant benefits for homeowners in Calgary. Improved drainage, increased structural integrity, and improved energy efficiency are just a few of the benefits a pitched roof can provide. If you’re considering pitching your flat roof, it’s important to work with a professional roofing contractor with experience in flat roofing in Calgary. They can assess the condition of your roof and provide recommendations on the best course of action to keep your home safe, comfortable, and protected for years to come.

 

City Roofing & Exteriors consistently takes pride in serving Calgarians. At City Roofing, we understand the importance of customer satisfaction. We put safety, quality work and on time delivery as our top priority. We work hard to assist our customers in providing proper roofing systems to meet their budget and needs. We offer completed roofing services in Calgary and area on both residential and commercial projects. We guarantee that you will be satisfied with our work and recommend City Roofing as your roofing consultant and contractor. Give us a call at 403-608-9933 or send an email to info@calgarycityroofing.com.
